_publications._publicationTitle: Anti-cancer agent 3-bromopyruvate reduces growth of MPNST and inhibits metabolic pathways in a representative in-vitro model.

_contextSnippet: We found no significant decreases in the viability of T265 cells (p ≥ 0.605)
details: Showed no significant decreases in viability with 3-BrPA treatment (p ≥ 0.605)
